name: Remix: Choosify Admin
description:
# EXISTING DASHBOARD UPGRADE INSTRUCTIONS (CRITICAL)

IMPORTANT:

This task is an UPGRADE and EXPANSION of the existing Choosify Admin Dashboard.

This is NOT a redesign project.

This is NOT a UI replacement project.

This is NOT a layout reconstruction project.

---

## PRESERVE EXISTING UI

Keep the current:

* Dashboard layout
* Sidebar structure
* Navigation system
* Header
* Footer
* Card styles
* Colors
* Typography
* Component styling
* Existing spacing patterns
* Existing responsive behavior
* Existing page routing
* Existing interactions

Do not replace any existing design language unless absolutely required for newly added functionality.

The current dashboard UI should remain visually recognizable after implementation.

Users should immediately recognize it as the same dashboard with significantly expanded capabilities.

---

## EXTEND FUNCTIONALITY ONLY

The objective is to transform the existing dashboard into a complete enterprise-grade CMS and marketplace management platform.

Add:

* New modules
* New management systems
* New workflows
* New permissions
* New data relationships
* New analytics
* New moderation tools
* New advertising tools
* New recommendation tools
* New creator tools
* New seller tools

while preserving the existing visual framework.

---

## KEEP CURRENT NAVIGATION

Do not remove working navigation.

Do not break existing routes.

Do not rename existing routes unless required.

Extend existing menus logically.

Insert new modules where appropriate.

Maintain familiarity for existing users.

---

## FULLY FUNCTIONAL IMPLEMENTATION

Everything added must be:

* Clickable
* Navigable
* Viewable
* Searchable
* Filterable
* Editable
* Testable

No static mockups.

No placeholder buttons.

No dead links.

No empty pages.

No "coming soon" components.

Every page must behave like a production-ready CMS.

---

## MAINTAIN EXISTING 3-COLUMN PHILOSOPHY

Where applicable, continue using the existing Choosify structure:

Left Column:

* Navigation
* Filters
* Controls

Middle Column:

* Primary content
* Main management interfaces

Right Column:

* Contextual information
* Quick actions
* Insights
* Status panels

New modules should naturally integrate into this structure.

---

## PRESERVE CURRENT DATA FLOWS

Do not remove or overwrite existing functionality.

All current working features must continue functioning.

Enhance and expand existing systems rather than replacing them.

---

## BUILD AS A REAL SOFTWARE PRODUCT

Treat Choosify as if it is launching to real users tomorrow.

Every dashboard page should function as a complete management system.

Every entity should support realistic workflows.

Every module should support CRUD operations.

Every module should support permissions.

Every module should support relationships with other modules.

Every module should support real-world management scenarios.

---

## FINAL IMPLEMENTATION GOAL

The final result should feel like:

"The current Choosify dashboard evolved into a fully-featured enterprise marketplace CMS"

NOT

"A completely different dashboard with a different design."

Preserve the existing identity.

Expand the capabilities.

Maintain user familiarity.

Increase operational power.

Keep everything production-ready, interconnected, fully navigable, fully manageable, and fully testable.
